label: Enforcement Gap
description: A world with invariants but no enforcement has a constitution that no one enforces. Governance exists on paper but not in practice.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Enforcement depth is 'none' but invariants are declared.
causal_translation.rule_text: Declaring invariants without enforcement is constitutional theater. The words exist but nothing enforces them.
causal_translation.shift_text: The gap between declared governance and actual governance becomes total.
causal_translation.effect_text: World integrity reduced to 40% of baseline. Enforcement: INACTIVE.
